purpose: AI-readable registry for canonical lib docs and indexed local layer docs.

rules.runtime_state_and_receipts: Do not move to lib. Index only when needed.

rules.markdown_docs: Copy into lib canon shelf unless already in lib or explicitly runtime-generated state contract.
